title: Ceiling Tiles
blurb: Range of tiles including Armstrong, AMF, OWA, British Gypsum, Rockfon, Ecophon and Burgess.

title: Ceiling Grid
blurb: Ready-to-buy grid, complete with main runners, edge trim, cross tees and suspension wire.

title: Metal Framing Ceiling Products
blurb: All metal framework readily available to buy individually or in kit form. Plasterboards also available.

title: Metal Stud & Track
alt: Metal stud and track partition components
blurb: Stud from 50mm to 146mm and track from 52mm to 148mm (also available in deep).

title: Plasterboards
blurb: Wallboards, Fireline, Soundbloc, Moisture Resistant and many more — 12.5mm and 15mm, square edge and tapered edge.

title: Partitioning Systems
blurb: DSi single- or double-glazed partitioning in any colour, plus DSi Fire & Sound system (1hr fire protection).
